overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The camera follows pedestrians through wet streets lined with towering skyscrapers, digital billboards, and cyberpunk architecture, transitioning from covered sidewalks to open intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban sidewalk with neon signage

events.description: camera shifts focus from character in white jacket to character in dark NCPD trench coat

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian wearing a white jacket and red hair along a wet city sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket with red hair walking steadily ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: reflective pavement with yellow tactile paving strips along the edge
building facade with large glowing digital advertisements and red neon accents
multi-level highway overpass with illuminated support columns
tall pole with horizontal neon light fixture spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet city sidewalk at night, following a character in a white jacket. Neon signs illuminate the right side while tall buildings create a canyon-like effect. The pavement reflects the colorful lights, and the camera maintains a steady third-person follow perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exits sidewalk and enters wide street intersection with yellow crosswalk markings
vehicles pass through the intersection while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: following an NCPD officer character across a wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

notable_agents.action: character wearing dark NCPD trench coat with red hair walking across the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad yellow painted lines marking the pedestrian crossing area
building with large digital signage displaying Japanese characters and red neon
tall palm trees visible in the distance against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide open intersection with prominent yellow crosswalk stripes. The camera follows the NCPD character across the street as vehicles pass by. Buildings with large digital billboards line the right side, and palm trees are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with storefronts and neon signage

events.description: exits crosswalk and steps onto sidewalk next to tall skyscraper
turns right at street corner and continues down the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along a busy sidewalk past various storefronts and pedestrians, turning at the corner

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket standing near a building entrance

entered.detail: glowing yellow neon sign reading 'EMPATHY' on the building facade
digital speed limit display mounted on a pole showing '40'
very tall dark glass building towering over the street with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the character walks along a busy downtown sidewalk. A prominent yellow 'EMPATHY' neon sign glows on the right, while a digital speed limit sign stands on the left. The character turns right at the corner and continues past other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital advertisements and futuristic architecture

events.description: passing building with distinctive circular blue neon lights on the facade
large digital billboard temporarily fills the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past commercial buildings with large digital displays and neon accents

entered.detail: row of glowing circular blue lights mounted vertically on the building facade
massive digital screen displaying advertisements with vivid colors
large advertisement displaying text 'REAL MAN'S SMELL' with product imagery

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the sidewalk past futuristic commercial buildings. Distinctive circular blue neon lights illuminate the right-side building, followed by a massive digital billboard. The street remains wet, reflecting the myriad of neon lights from the surrounding cyberpunk architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched futuristic city, transitioning from a narrow urban canyon into a wide intersection and back onto a bustling commercial sidewalk. It begins by following a character in a white jacket along a wet sidewalk where towering buildings and vibrant neon signs create a reflective, enclosed atmosphere. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a broad intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes and distant palm trees, while large digital billboards loom over the passing traffic. The camera then tracks the character across the street and onto a busy downtown walkway, passing a glowing yellow Empathy sign and a digital speed limit marker before turning the corner. Finally, the movement continues past futuristic commercial architecture illuminated by circular blue neon lights and massive digital displays that shimmer across the damp pavement.
